scripts.build:wasm: emcc src/wasm/gravity.cpp -O3 -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_ES6=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=createGravityModule -s ENVIRONMENT=web,worker,node -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=0 -s INITIAL_MEMORY=67108864 -s SINGLE_FILE=1 -s FILESYSTEM=0 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_compute_gravity,_get_pos_x_ptr,_get_pos_y_ptr,_get_mass_ptr,_get_radius_ptr,_get_acc_x_ptr,_get_acc_y_ptr,_get_max_particles,_build_collision_tree,_find_nearby_collision_candidates,_get_candidate_buffer_ptr,_get_max_candidates,_debug_max_leaf_occupancy -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=HEAPF32,HEAP32 -o src/lib/sim/gravityWasm.mjs
scripts.build:wasm:threaded: emcc src/wasm/gravity.cpp -O3 -pthread -s PTHREAD_POOL_SIZE=navigator.hardwareConcurrency -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_ES6=1 -s EXPORT_NAME=createGravityModule -s ENVIRONMENT=web,worker -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=0 -s INITIAL_MEMORY=67108864 -s FILESYSTEM=0 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=_compute_gravity,_get_pos_x_ptr,_get_pos_y_ptr,_get_mass_ptr,_get_radius_ptr,_get_acc_x_ptr,_get_acc_y_ptr,_get_max_particles,_build_collision_tree,_find_nearby_collision_candidates,_get_candidate_buffer_ptr,_get_max_candidates -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=HEAPF32,HEAP32 -o src/lib/sim/gravityWasm.threaded.mjs
scripts.build:wasm:all: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:wasm:threaded
